text:
Kosofftro (コズフトロ, Kozufutoro) was a Greed Island player, hired by Battera, and a founding member of an alliance formed to clear the game. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 132 

Appearance

Kosofftro's signature characteristic was his two prominent buck teeth hanging over his lower lip. He wore a broad-brimmed hat, a matching shirt, trousers, and shoes (all decorated with arrow motifs), and his limbs were wrapped in bandages. He was also seen carrying a sword. 

Personality

Kosofftro was shown to be both kind and cordial, as when he informs the new alliance members that they need to remember his name if they want to return to the group's hideout. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Kosofftro sits in a forest located near the base all day so that people can use him as a checkpoint and reach him with "Magnetic Force" and "Accompany" cards, thus allowing members to make their way to the base. Jispa uses an "Accompany" card on himself and the new recruits to transport them to Kosofftro, who welcomes them and introduces himself. Because Genthru placed his bombs on all members of the alliance, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 142 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 143 it can be assumed that Kosofftro was killed when the Bombers detonated all the bombs simultaneously. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 144 

Abilities & Powers

Since most of the alliance members joined because they lacked combat abilities, it can be assumed that Kosofftro also had none. 

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Kosofftro was capable of utilizing Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

Kosofftro does not appear in the 2011 anime adaptation of the series.
